comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.subtitle: We are expanding worldwide
comingSoon.description: A new era of premium travel is on the way. Discover localized concierge experiences and curated passes in more countries.

passDescriptions.usa: City-ready concierge and premium connectivity for every itinerary.
passDescriptions.canada: Luxury city escapes with seamless planning and local perks.
passDescriptions.uae: Premium shopping, dining, and mobility experiences in one pass.
passDescriptions.japan: Localized AI guidance and travel essentials launching shortly.
passDescriptions.france: Curated lifestyle recommendations with high-end partner access.
passDescriptions.morocco: Authentic local moments, concierge support, and premium deals.
